summary: Undeclared dependency and a committed runtime-state file.

findings.title: jsonwebtoken is not declared in package.json
findings.body: src/token.js requires jsonwebtoken, but package.json does not list it under dependencies; the build is not reproducible.

findings.title: Runtime state file committed
findings.body: .omc/state/job.json is runtime state that should not be committed; it should be gitignored.
